cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: Starts in black fullscreen mode (see my OS, hardware/driver specs). Proton config options made no difference. Still black. I had to open the game.xml file (in main game folder) and change Fullscreen to 'false'. Now, you can see the game and in the menu settings switch to your prefered resolution (incl. visible fullscreen). No Proton start config variables needed (in my case).
title: Farming Simulator 15

notes: I had to edit game.xml from main game folder and change Fullscreen to false before it would play.  Just a black screen when I first started.  Afterward, I tweaked my window size to something nice and haven't touched settings since.  The game plays beautifully, just like it did on Windows in my opinion.  Not one single issue.
title: Farming Simulator 15

title: Farming Simulator 15

notes:
You must browse the local game files and modify the game.xml to fullscreen=false OR modify the game.xml resolution settings to match the correct resolution.

Performance wise the game runs amazing. A benchmark of the game at both official(high graphics @ 1920x1080) and unofficial(ultra high graphics @ 2560x1080) led to amazing performance. The official clocked in FPS well above the 100 threshold, and the unofficial clocked in at a smooth and consistent 60 FPS(keep in mind this was with all settings turned on including VSYNC which limited the maximum frames).

You cannot save the benchmark data via the in-game save feature and must instead save it via prntscn after it is completed.
title: Farming Simulator 15
